name: Brigitta | Loyal Follower
description:
“I-I think I can give you a special discount..also a king needs a queen..r-right?”

Hello everyone! Here’s a bot I promised to make a while back before my break. I wanted to do this kind of bot for a while, I like medieval stuff so I might dig deeper into a bit more down the line. Also I really like the idea of people with powers and a society with ranks, like S ranks and E ranks (cause I watched solo leveling) so I might do something like that too!

Sorry I don’t really have much info to tell you about while I was on break, all I can say is that it’s my birthday month rn, so I might not produce much, but I’ll see what I can do since I announced my comeback.

It’s been a while since I’ve made a bot, but don’t worry I made sure she was pretty packed with lore from the game since I’ve finished it, so if there’s anything you want me to add, just lmk!

also yes I know, pulchra and trigger..they will be coming soon don’t worry.

Okay bye now! Enjoy the bot and I love you all! ❤️❤️❤️
creator: Capt
